name: @allica/shared-e2e Automation Platform
description: Enterprise E2E test automation npm library distributed via Azure Artifacts across 4 engineering squads. Features automated Azure Key Vault secret retrieval, local MSAL mock server for role-based JWT generation, and standardized authentication.

name: Raspberry Pi Home Lab
description: Self-hosted client-server architecture running on Raspberry Pi 5. Features Nginx reverse proxy, Docker, Immich for privacy-focused photo management, Pi-Hole for network-wide ad blocking and local DNS routing, and Jellyfin for media content management.

name: Scribble: Notes, Diary & Tasks
description: A new Flutter Notes taking project implemented with local database, shared prefs and bloc

name: SMS Stack
description: A privacy-focused utility for SMS categorization and financial insight extraction.

name: IKY
description: A multi-platform genealogy app with NestJS API, Flutter mobile client, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, MinIO, Docker Compose, Traefik.

name: Learning gen-AI
description: A React + MUI monorepo exploring AI-assisted UI patterns across 4 learning chapters (chapter-2 through chapter-4) using Vite, TypeScript, Framer Motion, Recharts, and Leaflet.
